name: Vanstar Mining Resources Inc.
summary: Vanstar Mining Resources Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, valuation, and development of mining properties in Canada. It primarily explores for gold deposits. The company's flagship property is the Nelligan project, which consists of 158 cells covering an area of approximately 8,851 hectares located near Chapais in Abitibi. Vanstar Mining Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Montreal, Canada.
